productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Green Sweater
description: Composition Green V-neck sleeveless sweater made of 80% lambswool and 20% nylon, has a ribbed neckline, arm holes and hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Classic Benetton style sweater for men. This united colors of benetton sweater promises exemplary comfort with its luxe fabric. Smart enough to wear with a shirt, wear this with a crisp shirt, denims, an understated belt and shoes from red tape. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
